title: feat: hello page layout and copy improvements
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Polishing the Welcome Mat
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the entryway. The Hello page is now wider, cleaner, and shows off our flywheel diagram with a bit more pride.
gist.summary: Refined the Hello page layout with a wider container, improved mobile responsiveness, and a larger, clearer flywheel diagram.
gist.impact: Visitors will experience a more spacious design that adapts better to mobile screens, making the platform's concepts easier to understand.
gist.visual_concept: The 'Hello' page represents the entry point. The 'flywheel' diagram is a key visual element mentioned. The scene should depict renovation or polishing of an entrance.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and the robot adjusting a large golden gear mechanism in a garden, representing the flywheel diagram. They are renovating a welcome sign. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Polly the bee wears a tiny construction hat. Chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'HELLO'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
